title: eschscholzia compacta
intro: Eschscholzia compacta, also known as the California poppy or dwarf California poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for treating anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Eschscholzia compacta include its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of depression and anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be made from its leaves, stems, and flowers, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
